* **IMMZD2DTTBEFSMEImmunLogic**

## Library: IMMZD2DTTBEFSMEImmunLogic 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTTBEFSMEImmunLogic | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-04-12 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTTBEFSMEImmunLogic |

 
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.FSME-Immun decision table in the Immunization CPG
